meta.title_te: గజేంద్రుడ్ని విష్ణువు 1000 సంవత్సరాలు ఎందుకు ఆలస్యం చేశాడు? | ఏనుగు & మొసలి అసలు కథ
meta.champion_grade: incandescent volumetric saffron-amber god-rays with molten ember core and warm ember underglow, molten gold ornament highlights, deep burnt-crimson and emerald-water shadows, high-contrast Netflix-grade warm cinematic devotional lighting, subtle film grain
meta.champion_camera: urgent handheld tracking at eye level, no Ken Burns, no slow-motion stretch
meta.champion_style: choreography — explicit physical verbs, weight, impact, momentum, motion blur; characters genuinely move, never a frozen living-photo
meta.consistency: Flow native Characters summoned by @handle; identity + voice locked per character
meta.notes: Telugu is NOT baked by Flow (garbled glyphs) — narration_te is xAI TTS (eve) rendered as synced Remotion subtitles; onscreen_te are optional emphasis kickers. Clips generated text-free and muted; Omni audio discarded. Benevolent framing on the chakra/death beats to dodge moderation (divine light dissolves, no claws/blade reaching AT a victim).

characters.desc: majestic royal white elephant king, ornate golden head ornaments and jeweled anklets, kind powerful eyes, regal bearing
the same white elephant king but exhausted and trembling, one front leg clamped, eyes turned upward in desperate devotion, body strained
enormous fierce dark-scaled crocodile, ridged armored back, ancient and menacing, glistening wet hide
Lord Vishnu, serene blue-skinned four-armed deity, golden silk and crown, calm radiant face, holding conch and the spinning Sudarshana Chakra
Garuda the great golden-winged eagle mount, muscular humanoid-avian, vast feathered wings, fierce noble face
King Indradyumna, handsome proud young king, rich royal robes and crown, arrogant prideful expression
Sage Agastya, old ascetic with long white beard and matted hair, rudraksha beads, stern wrathful eyes
Gandharva king Huhu, handsome celestial musician in shimmering divine attire, playful mischievous face
Sage Devala, grave elder ascetic, white beard, serious meditative face, simple ochre cloth

shots.video_prompt: @Gajendra the royal white elephant and @Crocodile the huge dark crocodile heave and strain against each other at the churning edge of a vast emerald lake; the elephant braces its legs and pulls back hard, water explodes upward in sheets, the crocodile thrashes its tail and drags forward; both are visibly exhausted, mud and spray fly, ripples ring outward; urgent handheld tracking at eye level, warm saffron-amber dawn god-rays over emerald water, cinematic devotional grade, subtle film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: వెయ్యి సంవత్సరాలు… ఒక ఏనుగు, ఒక మొసలి, ఒకే సరస్సులో పోరాడుతూనే ఉన్నాయి.

shots.video_prompt: slow push toward @Gajendra's straining upward-rolled eye reflecting the golden sky while @Crocodile's jaws stay locked below the waterline; water trembles, breath mists, the elephant's trunk lifts weakly; brooding suspense, warm saffron-amber rim light against deep emerald shadow, handheld micro-shake, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: కానీ విష్ణువు ఎందుకు అంత ఆలస్యం చేశాడు? అసలు కథ ఇది.

shots.video_prompt: @Indradyumna the proud young king strides across a sunlit marble palace hall, robes and gold jewelry swaying, chin raised arrogantly, attendants bowing as he sweeps past without a glance; banners ripple, dust motes drift in shafts of warm light; smooth handheld follow, opulent golden palace lighting, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: ఒకప్పుడు గజేంద్రుడు… ఇంద్రద్యుమ్నుడు అనే గర్విష్ఠి రాజు.

shots.video_prompt: @Agastya the white-bearded sage walks into the palace hall expecting welcome, but @Indradyumna remains seated and turns his face away dismissively, waving a careless hand; the sage halts, robes settling, his expression hardening; courtiers freeze; tense handheld at eye level, warm palace light cooling toward shadow, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: అగస్త్య మహర్షి వచ్చినప్పుడు, రాజు గర్వంతో ఆయనను గౌరవించలేదు.

shots.video_prompt: @Agastya raises his hand and points sharply at @Indradyumna, beard and matted hair lifting, eyes blazing as he pronounces a curse; a ripple of energy distorts the air and the king recoils, shielding his face, his form beginning to shimmer; embers and dust swirl; urgent handheld push-in, incandescent saffron-amber flare against burnt-crimson shadow, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: కోపించిన మహర్షి శపించాడు — ఏనుగువై జన్మించు అని.

shots.video_prompt: @Huhu the handsome celestial gandharva drifts playfully through a shimmering heavenly garden of glowing lotuses and floating petals, laughing, strumming a divine instrument, robes trailing light; soft clouds part around him; graceful handheld drift, ethereal warm-gold celestial glow, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: ఇక మొసలి… పూర్వజన్మలో హుహు అనే గంధర్వ రాజు.

shots.video_prompt: @Devala the grave sage stands waist-deep in a clear celestial river in meditation when @Huhu mischievously lunges underwater and yanks the sage's ankle, pulling him off balance; water splashes up, the sage's arms fly out, his serene face snapping to alarm then anger; playful-turned-grave energy, handheld at water level, warm dawn light on rippling water, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: దేవల మహర్షి స్నానం చేస్తుండగా, హుహు ఆయన కాలును పట్టి లాగాడు.

shots.video_prompt: @Devala rises from the water pointing a trembling wrathful finger at @Huhu, who staggers back as a wave of curse-energy washes over him and his form begins to shimmer and lengthen toward a reptilian shape; spray and light distort the air; urgent handheld push-in, saffron-amber flare over emerald water and deep shadow, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text

wide shot of the vast lake at golden hour as @Gajendra and @Crocodile lock together again, the elephant rearing and twisting, the crocodile rolling its armored body; huge sheets of water burst and rain down, waves slam the shore, birds scatter; powerful momentum and impact, urgent handheld tracking, warm saffron-amber light raking across emerald water, cinematic devotional grade, motion blur, film grain, no text

tight churning shot as @Crocodile clamps onto @Gajendra's front leg and thrashes side to side while the elephant trumpets and pulls back with all its weight, muscles straining, water and mud spraying in arcs; relentless struggle, handheld micro-shake at eye level, warm amber light cutting through emerald spray, cinematic devotional grade, motion blur, film grain, no text

@GajendraPain the exhausted trembling elephant sinks lower into the water, one leg clamped below, its strength visibly failing, sides heaving, eyes beginning to lift upward; ripples settle around it, light dims toward dusk; slow handheld settle, mournful warm-amber half-light over darkening emerald water, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: గజేంద్రుని బలం క్షీణించింది. కాలు మొసలి నోటిలో చిక్కుకుంది.

shots.video_prompt: @GajendraPain stops struggling and grows still, lifting its head and trunk slowly toward the sky in dawning realization, eyes filling with surrender and devotion; the water calms to glass, first warm light touches its face; reverent slow handheld rise, soft golden god-rays breaking over the lake, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: అప్పుడు గజేంద్రుడు తన బలాన్ని నమ్ముకోవడం మానేశాడు.

shots.video_prompt: @GajendraPain curls its trunk down to the water, plucks a single glowing pink lotus, and lifts it high overhead as an offering toward the heavens; droplets fall in slow sparkling arcs, the lotus catches radiant light; tender deliberate motion, warm saffron-amber god-rays streaming down onto the elephant and lotus, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: తొండంతో ఒక పద్మాన్ని ఎత్తి, విష్ణువుకు అర్పించాడు.

shots.video_prompt: serene devotional close shot of @Gajendra the white elephant lifting its head and trunk skyward in calm heartfelt prayer while holding a glowing pink lotus, eyes peaceful and full of faith, soft warm light blooming around it; gentle reverent motion, radiant golden devotional glow, emerald water bokeh behind, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: నన్ను రక్షించు స్వామీ అని హృదయపూర్వకంగా శరణాగతి చేశాడు.

shots.video_prompt: @Vishnu the radiant blue four-armed deity descends from a burst of divine light astride @Garuda the great golden-winged eagle, wings sweeping down hard and throwing back clouds, silk and garlands streaming, the Sudarshana Chakra spinning brilliantly on a finger; clouds part, golden rays explode outward; majestic powerful descent, urgent handheld upward tracking, blinding saffron-gold celestial radiance, cinematic devotional grade, motion blur, film grain, no text

@Vishnu releases the spinning Sudarshana Chakra, a blazing wheel of golden light that streaks across the lake; where it passes a brilliant radiance blooms over the water and the crocodile's dark form dissolves peacefully into rising motes of light, freed; water glows, ripples of light expand; benevolent divine release, no blade or claw touching a victim, urgent handheld, incandescent saffron-gold light over emerald water, cinematic devotional grade, motion blur, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: సుదర్శన చక్రం ప్రయోగించి, మొసలిని విముక్తి చేశాడు.

shots.video_prompt: @Vishnu gently lifts the freed @Gajendra from the water with a radiant hand as the elephant rises restored and whole, trunk curling upward in joy; two soft luminous spirits ascend together into the golden sky; relief and grace, slow handheld rise, warm radiant god-rays flooding the calm lake, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text

serene close shot of @Vishnu's calm radiant face turning down toward @Gajendra with a gentle protective smile, one hand raised in blessing, the elephant resting its head against him; light pulses warmly between them; tender stillness with breathing motion, soft handheld, glowing saffron-gold devotional light, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: విష్ణువు ఆలస్యం చేయలేదు… పూర్తి శరణాగతి కోసమే వేచి ఉన్నాడు.

shots.video_prompt: final wide shot of @Vishnu blessing @Gajendra at the edge of a glassy golden lake at sunrise, light radiating outward in vast warm god-rays, lotuses blooming across the water, the scene breathing with gentle motion; transcendent peace, slow handheld settle, luminous saffron-amber devotional glow, cinematic devotional grade, film grain, no text
shots.narration_te: భక్తి, పూర్తి శరణాగతి కంటే గొప్పది ఏదీ లేదు.
